content_of_post_to_comment: There is a man in our neighborhood who has an entire business coming to your home & fixing/servicing your lawnmower. He makes a great living, works 6-7 months a year, and has a great life. There are a thousand ways to make a living if you're creative.
comment: There’s a distinction between scalable businesses and ‘enough’ businesses. This lawnmower repair setup is proximity-and-trust arbitrage; 6–7 month cap limits scale but maximizes life yield.
